queries.question: What is the customer support description for each streaming service?
queries.sql: SELECT customer_support.description  from streaming_service_customer_support join customer_support on streaming_service_customer_support.customer_support_id = customer_support.id join streaming_service on streaming_service_customer_support.streaming_service_id = streaming_service.id   GROUP BY streaming_service_customer_support.customer_support_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT streaming_service_customer_support.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  streaming_service)

queries.question: What is the customer support description for each streaming service?
queries.sql: select streaming_service.name , customer_support.description from streaming_service_customer_support join customer_support on streaming_service_customer_support.customer_support_id = customer_support.id join streaming_service on streaming_service_customer_support.streaming_service_id = streaming_service.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_customer_support a :streaming_service_customer_support .
  ?customer_support a :customer_support .
  ?streaming_service_customer_support p:hascustomer_support ?customer_support .
  ?streaming_service a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_customer_support p:hasstreaming_service ?streaming_service .
  ?streaming_service p:name ?name .
  ?customer_support p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Show me the type of support each streaming service provides.
queries.sql: SELECT customer_support.support_type  from streaming_service_customer_support join customer_support on streaming_service_customer_support.customer_support_id = customer_support.id join streaming_service on streaming_service_customer_support.streaming_service_id = streaming_service.id   GROUP BY streaming_service_customer_support.customer_support_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT streaming_service_customer_support.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  streaming_service)

queries.question: Show me the type of support each streaming service provides.
queries.sql: select streaming_service.name , customer_support.support_type from streaming_service_customer_support join customer_support on streaming_service_customer_support.customer_support_id = customer_support.id join streaming_service on streaming_service_customer_support.streaming_service_id = streaming_service.id

queries.question: Give me the customer support type and description in common for all streaming services.
queries.sql: SELECT customer_support.support_type, customer_support.description  from streaming_service_customer_support join customer_support on streaming_service_customer_support.customer_support_id = customer_support.id join streaming_service on streaming_service_customer_support.streaming_service_id = streaming_service.id   GROUP BY streaming_service_customer_support.customer_support_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT streaming_service_customer_support.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  streaming_service)

queries.question: What is the customer support type and description for each streaming service?
queries.sql: select streaming_service.name , customer_support.support_type , customer_support.description from streaming_service_customer_support join customer_support on streaming_service_customer_support.customer_support_id = customer_support.id join streaming_service on streaming_service_customer_support.streaming_service_id = streaming_service.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?support_type ?description WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_customer_support a :streaming_service_customer_support .
  ?customer_support a :customer_support .
  ?streaming_service_customer_support p:hascustomer_support ?customer_support .
  ?streaming_service a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_customer_support p:hasstreaming_service ?streaming_service .
  ?streaming_service p:name ?name .
  ?customer_support p:support_type ?support_type .
  ?customer_support p:description ?description .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the customer support type and description for each streaming service?
What is the customer support description for each streaming service?
Show me the type of support each streaming service provides.
